underlying_goal: Add Hyperscan prefilter mode flag to a benchmark tool and compare performance between normal and prefilter modes across different pattern sets
friction_detail: Initial test attempts failed due to missing data files and headers, requiring synthetic data generation and package installation.
brief_summary: User wanted to add HS_FLAG_PREFILTER support to a Hyperscan benchmark tool, test it across pattern sets, and compare results — all completed and pushed.
